channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Biden suggests Trump 'get a life' after false hurricane claims
item.description: Biden specially called out a claim that those impacted by the storm are only receiving $750 in government assistance.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: Milton's gone, but the political storm keeps raging over federal government's hurricane efforts
item.description: There's no let up in the war of words between President Biden and former President Trump over the government's response to dangerous hurricanes that slammed into the southeast.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Back-to-back hurricanes reshape 2024 campaign’s final stretch
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A pair of unwelcome and destructive guests named Helene and Milton have stormed their way into this year's presidential election.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The drownings of 2 Navy SEALs were preventable, military investigation finds
item.description: A military investigation has concluded that two U.S. Navy SEALs drowned as they tried to climb aboard a ship carrying illicit Iranian-made weapons to Yemen because of glaring training failures and a lack of understanding about what to do after a fall into deep, turbulent waters.
item.dc:creator: Lolita C. Baldor, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Harris viewed more positively by Hispanic women than by Hispanic men: AP-NORC poll
item.description: A solid majority of Hispanic women have a positive opinion of Vice President Kamala Harris and a negative view of former President Donald Trump, but Hispanic men are divided on both candidates, according to a recent AP-NORC poll.
item.dc:creator: Fernanda Figueroa And Linley Sanders, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: US House control teeters on the unlikely battleground of heavily Democratic California
item.description: California's reputation as a politically liberal state is being tested in a string of U.S. House districts that are expected to play into control of the chamber.
item.dc:creator: Michael R. Blood, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Obama urges Black men to show up for Harris as he campaigns in critical Pennsylvania
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Former President Barack Obama gave a blistering critique of his White House successor Donald Trump and urged Black men to show up for Kamala Harris as he campaigned in Pittsburgh on Thursday at the start of a swing-state tour for the Democratic ticket.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE L. PRICE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Harris rips Trump for his criticism of federal storm response and calls for 'dignity'
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Vice President Kamala Harris and the White House criticized Donald Trump for his attacks on the federal response to Hurricanes Helene and Milton and suggested he was wrongly trying to turn the deadly storms to his political advantage.
item.dc:creator: ISABELLA VOLMERT, DARLENE SUPERVILLE and WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah candidates for Mitt Romney's open US Senate seat debate approaches to climate change
item.description: OGDEN, Utah (AP) — The Republican and Democratic candidates vying for Mitt Romney’s open U.S. Senate seat sought to convince Utah voters on Thursday that they have the better blueprint to tackle climate change and protect the state's vast natural resources. Republican U.S. Rep.
item.dc:creator: HANNAH SCHOENBAUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Alsobrooks backs court-packing as Hogan fights GOP, McConnell, Trump associations
item.description: Larry Hogan and Angela Alsobrooks faced off during a debate less than one month before the Senate election.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Annette Dawson Owens discusses education, healthcare, and affordable housing
item.description: Annette Dawson Owens, a Republican candidate for Nevada’s Assembly District 29, recently discussed her views on education, healthcare, and affordable housing on 8 News Now’s Daily Voting Guide.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump insults Detroit while campaigning in the city
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Former President Donald Trump criticized Detroit while delivering remarks to an economic group there on Thursday, saying the whole country would end up like the city if his Democratic opponent, Vice President Kamala Harris, is elected.
item.dc:creator: JOEY CAPPELLETTI and ISABELLA VOLMERT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Speculation continues over Cuomo run for NYC mayor
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- There has been growing speculation this week that former Gov. Andrew Cuomo is rapidly approaching a decision about whether or not to run for New York City mayor.
item.dc:creator: Henry Rosoff, PIX 11

item.title: Political storm: On Trump 'onslaught of lies,' Biden urges former president to 'get a life man'
item.description: There's no let up in the war of words between President Biden and former President Trump over the federal government's response to back-to-back dangerous hurricanes that slammed into the southeast.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Independent in key House race suspends campaign, saying he was 'pawn' in election fraud scheme
item.description: A congressional candidate who said he was tricked by Democrats into running as a spoiler in a competitive House race in Minnesota suspended his campaign Thursday and endorsed his Republican rival.
item.dc:creator: RYAN J. FOLEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump leads Harris by 4 points in Florida: Survey
item.description: Former President Trump is leading Vice President Harris by a narrow 4 points in Florida, according to a new survey of likely voters in the state.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, NewsNation

item.title: Harris accepts invite to CNN town hall as another Trump debate appears unlikely
item.description: Vice President Harris has accepted an invitation from CNN to participate in a town hall on the network a week before Election Day, as it appears unlikely that former President Trump will agree to a second debate with her.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Harris, Trump in virtual dead heat in major swing states
item.description: Vice President Harris and former President Trump are nearly tied in the major swing states that will play a deciding role in the election, according to polling released Thursday by The Hill and Emerson College Polling.
item.dc:creator: Julia Manchester, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Don’t expect hurricane ‘truth telling from anybody’: Bill O’Reilly
item.description: "Republicans and Donald Trump are trying to use a storm for political advantage, but so is Kamala Harris,” O'Reilly said.
item.dc:creator: Rich Johnson, NewsNation

item.title: Candidate Kamilah Bywaters discusses her vision for the Clark County School Board
item.description: Kamilah Bywaters, a candidate for the Clark County School District (CCSD) Board of Trustees, joined 8 News Now’s Daily Voting Guide to discuss her plans and priorities for District E, which covers Summerlin and northwest parts of the Las Vegas Valley.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Mayor Frey vetoes carbon emission fee adopted by city council
item.description: In his veto letter Minneapolis Mayor Jacob Frey said he agrees with the aims of the fee on polluters, but he said the council’s action amounts to an “unauthorized tax.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Thamer, MPR News

item.title: Trump Florida resort hosts linemen before Hurricane Milton response
item.description: The Trump Organization extended an invitation to more than 200 power linemen to stay at their golf resort in Miami Wednesday, as Florida's Gulf Coast prepares for Hurricane Milton to make landfall this week.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, NewsNation

item.title: Melania Trump waves off 'hand-swatting incident': A 'mere misunderstanding'
item.description: The then-first lady made headlines in 2017 when footage taken during a trip to Tel Aviv appeared to show her brushing away Trump's hand.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, NewsNation

item.title: Florida Republican suggests Greene have ‘head examined’ over hurricane claims
item.description: Florida Republican Rep. Carlos A. Gimenez suggested Wednesday that Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-Ga.) should have her “head examined” after she claimed humans can control the weather.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: WATCH: Candidates for Las Vegas Mayor face off in a debate ahead of Election Day
item.description: Las Vegas Mayoral candidates Shelley Berkley and Victoria Seaman will face off in a debate on Tuesday, hosted by 8 News Now, with the winner taking over the non-partisan office from Oscar Goodman, who served as mayor from 1999 to 2011.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Cook Political Report shifts Wisconsin Senate race toward GOP
item.description: The Cook Political Report on Tuesday shifted the Wisconsin Senate race from "lean Democrat" to "toss up," handing Republican Eric Hovde a boost as he tries to unseat Sen. Tammy Baldwin (D-Wis.).
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, NewsNation

item.title: U.S. Treasury says tribally owned entities should be tax-exempt
item.description: Proposed new guidelines would clarify the decades-old question of whether tribal businesses or entities are exempt from federal taxes.
item.dc:creator: MPR News

item.title: Pro-Trump Christian nationalists are on tour to recruit election workers
item.description: “Are you guys ready to show the world that Christians will be silent no more?” said one speaker, whose nonprofit is recruiting people to become election workers.
item.dc:creator: Lisa Hagen and Audrey Nguyen, MPR News

item.title: Major North Carolina newspaper knocks Trump over Helene response 'falsehoods'
item.description: A leading newspaper in North Carolina is blasting former President Donald Trump over what it calls his "falsehoods" about the government response to Hurricane Helene, which devastated large swaths of the state last week.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, Fox 5

item.title: GOP senator calls Trump special counsel filing 'a temper tantrum from a deranged fanatic'
item.description: Arkansas Sen. Tom Cotton (R) said in a Sunday interview that a recently unsealed filing from special counsel Jack Smith is “a temper tantrum from a deranged fanatic.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, Fox 5

item.title: Minnesota Republicans seek a reset after two years of DFL trifecta in St. Paul
item.description: All 134 Minnesota House seats are on the ballot this fall, along with one state Senate seat. The results could flip political control of the Legislature.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: Thousands join pro-Palestinian rallies around the globe as Oct. 7 anniversary nears
item.description: Police used tear gas and water cannons to disperse violent demonstrators in Rome as tens of thousands pro-Palestinian protesters took to the streets in European cities and around the globe, calling for a cease-fire as the first anniversary of the Hamas attacks on Israel approached.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News
